title: GuardrailDecisionEngineConfig
description: Schema for a guardrail decision engine configuration. Encodes the selection rules, precedence rules, composition constraints, and state machine transitions that govern pattern activation. Consumes the ten decision primitives defined in docs/decision-flows/decision-primitives.md.

version.description: Semantic version of this engine configuration.

deploymentId.description: Unique identifier for the deployment this configuration governs.

primitives.description: Configuration for the ten decision primitives (P1–P10). Each primitive defines how its value is computed or accepted.

selectionRules.description: Ordered list of pattern selection rules. Rules are evaluated in order. First matching rule wins unless combineAll is true.

precedenceOrder.description: Inter-category precedence order, highest to lowest. Determines which category's pattern renders first when multiple categories activate simultaneously.

compositionConstraints.description: Rules for legal and illegal pattern combinations. Enforced by the composition engine.

maxSimultaneousWarnings.description: Maximum number of warning patterns that may render simultaneously. Always 1.

maxSimultaneousRefusals.description: Maximum number of refusal patterns that may render simultaneously. Always 1.

illegalCombinations.description: Pattern ID pairs that must never activate simultaneously.

stateTransitions.description: Valid state machine transitions per category. Enforced by the state transition engine.

auditConfig.description: Audit logging configuration for this engine instance.

immutable.description: When true, audit records cannot be modified after creation.

retentionDays.description: Minimum number of days audit records are retained.

RiskPrimitive.description: P1 — Risk. Integer 0–4. Governs pattern severity and escalation triggers.

4.description: Critical — safety, security, or compliance incident risk.

ConfidencePrimitive.description: P2 — Confidence. The AI system's epistemic state about its output.

thresholds.description: Score boundaries for each confidence state.

low.description: Minimum score for Low confidence (below = Insufficient).

minSources.description: Minimum number of contradictory sources required to activate conflicting-evidence-state.

sustainedWindowSeconds.description: For system-initiated monitoring: seconds of sustained conflict before CE state activates.

unresolvableWindowSeconds.description: Seconds a CE state must be sustained before transitioning to unresolvable-state. Safety-critical deployments should set this low (e.g., 30–240).

CapabilityPrimitive.description: P3 — Capability. Whether the AI system can complete the requested action.

forbiddenActions.description: Action types the AI is never capable of executing in this deployment (hard capability limits).

PermissionPrimitive.description: P4 — Permission. Whether the requesting user or system is authorized for the requested action.

roleMap.description: Maps role names to authority tiers (Tier 1 = standard; Tier 2 = power; Tier 3 = admin/override).

passiveDismissalEqualsDenial.description: When true, closing a permission request without explicit grant counts as a denial. Must be true for all consequential action types.

PolicyPrimitive.description: P5 — Policy. Whether a configured policy rule applies to the current interaction.

levels.description: Active policy levels for this deployment. Tenant-level takes precedence over deployment-level.

IntentPrimitive.description: P6 — User Intent. The category of action the user is requesting.

BusinessImpactPrimitive.description: P7 — Business Impact. Organizational consequence of the AI's action.

AuthorityPrimitive.description: P8 — User Authority. The user's authorization tier for consequential decisions.

2.description: Power user / supervisor — can approve within defined limits.

3.description: Admin / executive — can authorize policy exceptions.

ContextFreshnessPrimitive.description: P9 — Context Freshness. Whether the AI's knowledge and data are current for this query.

staleThresholdDays.description: Number of days after which data is considered stale for this deployment context.

SourceReliabilityPrimitive.description: P10 — Source Reliability. Assessed credibility of the AI's information sources.

sourceTrustMap.description: Maps source types to default reliability scores (0=none, 1=low, 2=medium, 3=high).

conditions.description: Primitive values that must match for this rule to activate. All conditions are AND-logic.

activatePatterns.description: Pattern IDs to activate when conditions match.

skipPatterns.description: Pattern IDs explicitly suppressed by this rule.

StateTransitionMap.description: State machine transitions. Keys are source states; values are arrays of valid target states.
